name: Gambling is Fun
effect: Roll two D6's and resolve an effect for each result. On a roll of 1 You lose 3 HP. On a roll of 2 you gain two random Stat Reductions. On a roll of 3 you gain two random Stat Increases. On a roll of 4 you Heal 3 HP. On a roll of 5 a random target besides yourself Heals 3 HP. On a roll of 6 use Metronome three times and pick one result to immediately perform.
description: Roll me some even more bones.
